question: You updated the Terraform code to change a load balancer port from 80 to 443. Another team member manually changes the port to 443 through the console before you run apply. What will happen when you terraform apply?
choices: A. Terraform will fail with an error because the state file is no longer accurate.
B. Terraform will change the load balancer port to 80, and then change it back to 443.
C. Terraform will not make any changes to the Load Balancer and will update the state file to reflect any changes made.
D. Terraform will recreate the load balancer.
description: Terraform 會在 apply 時先刷新狀態，發現實際環境已手動更改為目標值 (443)，因此不會對資源進行物理變更，僅更新狀態檔。

question: Which of the following is not an action performed by terraform init?
choices: C. Retrieve the source code for all referenced modules
description: terraform init 用於初始化後端、下載模組與載入插件，但不會自動建立模板設定檔 (*.tf)。

question: A child module can always access variables declared in its parent module.
description: 子模組是隔離的單元，無法自動存取父模組變數，必須由父模組顯式傳遞。

question: Before you can use a new backend or HCP Terraform/Terraform Cloud integration, you must first execute terraform init.
description: 更換或初次使用後端時，必須執行 init 來配置與初始化相關設定。

question: resource "google_compute_instance" "main" { name = "test" }. What is the Terraform resource name of this block?
description: Terraform 的資源名稱（Resource Name）是指資源類型後的第二個識別碼，此例中為 'main'。

question: When referencing a module from the Terraform Registry, how do you specify version 1.0.0?
choices: A. You cannot specify versioning in Registry
B. Add a version = "1.0.0" attribute to the module block
C. It always defaults to version 1.0.0
D. Append ?ref=v1.0.0 to the source path
description: 對於 Registry 來源的模組，應在 module 區塊內使用 version 屬性。

question: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) allows you to automate infrastructure provisioning.
description: 自動化基礎設施佈署是 IaC 的核心價值之一。

question: Terraform encrypts sensitive values stored in your state file.
description: Terraform 的狀態檔（.tfstate）內容預設是以純文字儲存，包含 sensitive 的值，需依賴後端加密功能來保護。

question: When should you run terraform init?
choices: A. Every time you run terraform apply
B. After plan but before apply
C. After you start coding a new project and before you run plan for the first time
description: init 是在編寫完代碼後、進行任何 plan 或 apply 之前的首要步驟。

question: When is the best time to run terraform validate?
choices: B. Before plan to validate code syntax
C. Before apply to validate infrastructure
D. After apply to validate credentials
description: 在執行 plan 之前使用 validate 可先行檢查語法錯誤，節省除錯時間。

question: Which of these commands makes your code more human readable?
description: terraform fmt 指令專門用於調整代碼格式，提升其可讀性。

question: Terraform configuration can only import from the public registry.
description: Terraform 支援從私有註冊表、Git、本地路徑等多種來源導入。

question: What is the Terraform resource name of the following resource block? (Refer to similar image in 332)
description: 根據 HCL 定義，資源塊標籤的第二個字串即為資源名稱。

question: terraform init retrieves and caches the configuration for all remote modules.
description: init 會掃描配置，將所有引用的遠端模組原始碼下載並緩存在本地 .terraform 目錄。

question: Terraform configuration can only call modules from the public registry.
description: Terraform 亦可呼叫私有或本地模組。

question: resource "kubernetes_namespace" "example" { name = "test" }. How would you reference the attribute name of this resource in HCL?
description: 引用資源屬性的正確格式為 <TYPE>.<NAME>.<ATTR>，不包含 'resource' 前綴。

question: Terraform variables and outputs can store a 'description' argument in the state file.
description: 描述欄位僅供代碼說明使用，不會被記錄到狀態檔中。

question: What happens when you execute terraform plan?
choices: C. Compares code and local state to determine changes
D. Refreshes state, then compares to configuration to create an execution plan
description: plan 會先執行刷新，接著對比實際狀態與期望配置，生成執行計畫。

question: What does terraform destroy do?
choices: A. Destroys state file, leaves infrastructure
B. Destroys code files, leaves state
C. Destroy all infrastructure in the Terraform state file
D. Destroys all infrastructure in the configured Provider
description: destroy 會銷毀狀態檔中所追蹤管理的所有基礎設施資源。

question: When you reference a module from the Registry, the 'version' attribute is required.
description: version 是選用屬性，若未指定則預設使用最新版本。

question: Your root module contains a variable named num_servers. Which is the correct way to pass its value to a child module with an input named servers?
description: 在父模組呼叫子模組時，應使用 'var.變數名' 的語法將值賦予子模組的輸入引數。

question: What does the default local Terraform backend store?
description: 預設的本地後端主要用於儲存追蹤基礎設施狀態的 State file。

question: You are making changes to existing Terraform code to add some new infrastructure. When is the best time to run terraform validate?
choices: A. Before you run terraform apply, so you can validate your provider credentials.
B. Before you run terraform plan, so you can validate your code syntax.
C. After you run terraform apply, so you can validate your infrastructure.
D. After you run terraform plan, so you can validate that your state file is consistent with your infrastructure.
description: terraform validate 用於檢查代碼語法與內部一致性，最佳時機是在執行 plan 之前。

question: Which method for sharing Terraform modules fulfills the following criteria: 1. Keeps the module configurations confidential. 2. Supports semantic version constraints. 3. Provides a browsable directory?
choices: B. A subfolder within your workspace.
C. HCP Terraform/Terraform Cloud private registry.
D. A Git repository containing your modules.
description: 只有私有註冊表（Private Registry）能同時滿足保密性、版本控制與目錄瀏覽這三項需求。

question: When developing a Terraform module, how would you specify the version when publishing it to the official Terraform Registry?
choices: A. Terraform Registry does not support versioning modules.
B. Mention it on the module’s configuration page on the Terraform Registry
C. Tag a release in your module’s source control repository.
D. Configure it in the module’s Terraform code.
description: 發布模組至註冊表時，版本是透過在原始碼倉庫（如 GitHub）中標記 Release Tag 來確定的。

question: What functionality do providers offer in Terraform? (Choose three.)
choices: A. Interact with cloud provider APIs.
B. Provision resources for on-premises infrastructure services.
C. Provision resources for public cloud infrastructure services.
D. Group a collection of Terraform configuration files that map to a single state file.
E. Enforce security and compliance policies.
description: Provider 負責與 API 互動，並佈署公有雲或地端基礎設施資源。

question: Which command(s) adds existing resources in a public cloud into Terraform state?
description: terraform import 是將已存在的雲端資源納入 Terraform 狀態管理的專用指令。

question: It is _________ to change the Terraform backend from the default “local” backend to a different one after performing your first terraform apply.
description: 在 apply 之後更改後端是可行的（選用），Terraform 會引導您進行狀態遷移。

question: A child module can always access variables declared in its parent module.
description: 子模組預設無法存取父模組變數，必須由父模組顯式傳入。

question: What is modified when executing Terraform in refresh-only mode?
description: refresh-only 模式只會更新狀態檔以反映真實環境，不會變動基礎設施或設定檔。

question: Which of the following locations can Terraform use as a private source for modules? (Choose two.)
choices: C. Internally hosted VCS (Version Control System) platform.
description: 私有模組來源通常包括內部託管的 VCS 平台或 GitHub 上的私有倉庫。
